role: Software Engineering Intern - Backend and ML
responsibilites: Built the MLOps pipeline to automate model training, monitoring and deployment.
jobResponsibilites: Built the MLOps pipeline that automated model training, validation, deployment and monitoring using Azure ML and Prefect, reducing training-to-deployment time by 80%.
Leveraged Prefect to design orchestration workflows that parallelized ML model training across remote compute on Azure ML, reducing server processing time and load by 40% and 70% respectively.

Identified data processing bottlenecks on the frontend and refactored API calls for direct uploads to Azure Blob Storage via signed URLs, reducing memory-related failure events on the client-side by 40–50%.

responsibilites: Researched about the application of machine learning to improve equipment calibration time.
jobResponsibilites: Collaborated with Pfizer and led a research project on the application of machine learning for equipment calibration, reducing operational downtime in pharmaceutical plants.

Modeled industrial processes using RNN-based models (PyTorch) with reliable predictions at <5% MAPE, improving equipment recalibration time by 75% through faster feedback loops compared to traditional methods.
Designed API endpoints (FastAPI) to run inference on ML models and built Docker images for reproducible deployments, reducing integration time for industry collaborators by 43%.
Organized bi-weekly meetings to collect UX feedback from collaborators and consistently resolved 90% of UI concerns in the React.js application prior to subsequent review cycles.

role: Process and Equipment Engineer - Dry Etch
responsibilites: Monitored the product line, resolved process issues and qualified equipment for production.
jobResponsibilites: Conducted rigorous statistical analysis of the product line, pinpointed underlying factors contributing to KPI drifts, and delivered weekly analytical reports to cross-functional stakeholders.

Extracted, transformed, and analyzed manufacturing datasets to optimize process and equipment performance, identifying equipment requiring preventive maintenance and ensuring >80% availability of production equipment.
